sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38516" key="e)peisqrw/|skw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπεισ-θρῴσκω</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 2</tns> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπείσθορε,</foreign> <sense id="n38516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spring in after,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.219.7</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
